biological_replicate: Leishmania infantum MHOM/MA/67/ITMAP-263 was used in this study.
experimental_design: we used co-immunoprecipitation and mass spectrometry studies...
factor_value: to identify the Leishmania infantum VCP (LiVCP) interactome and to predict molecular interactions between LiVCP and its major cofactors.
number_of_fractions: digitonin fractionation and indirect immunofluorescence studies.
